global_description: A small amphibian with a slender, elongated body and smooth, moist skin. It is typically pale pink or white with visible external gills on either side of its head. The axolotl has a wide, flat head with small eyes and a broad mouth. Its limbs are short with delicate fingers, and it has a long, tapering tail.

part_details.head: Wide and flat with small eyes and external gills
part_details.body: Slender and elongated with smooth skin
part_details.gills: Feathery, external, located on sides of head

spatial_relations: Gills positioned on sides of head
Limbs attached to sides of body
Tail extending from rear of body
